> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add currents-dev/playwright-best-practices-skill --skill playwright-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/playwright-best-practices`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/playwright-best-practices.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add currents-dev/playwright-best-practices-skill --skill playwright-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

playwright-best-practices is a comprehensive reference for writing, debugging, and maintaining Playwright tests (E2E, component, API, visual, accessibility, security). It organizes guidance by activity (writing new tests, debugging flaky tests, mobile, auth, file ops, CI/CD, POM vs fixtures, framework-specific, etc.) and points to a large set of reference files (core/, testing-patterns/, debugging/, infrastructure-ci-cd/, etc.). From currents-dev.

## Install Prerequisites

`npx skills add currents-dev/playwright-best-practices-skill --skill playwright-best-practices -y -g -a ...`

Assumes Playwright is installed in the project; complements the official Playwright CLI skill.

## Upstream Maintainer

currents-dev (https://github.com/currents-dev/playwright-best-practices-skill).

## Comparable Alternatives

Official Playwright docs + examples; other E2E framework skills (Cypress, Selenium, Puppeteer patterns).

&gt; Evidence gathered from public GitHub (raw SKILL.md). Not an endorsement or authority.
